title: Tactical 3D Tools PvP X Simply Swords
description: [ Java Port ] an another 3d tools pack, but also for PVP, and NOW WITH MOD COMPATABILITIES
body:
**Please Donate To Help Support With The Pack Development, It Will Also Help Me Out Alot With My Current Situation And Some Things Going On, Thank You :)** 

https://ko-fi.com/cmdrmcnuggets


~~This is my 3rd non-requireable pack so far, no need Optifine, Fabric, Forge, etc, (For now)~~
Yuo may need Fabric/Forge with ETF and EMF mod so that some of 3d tools mod item models that use entity codes can work

https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

https://modrinth.com/mod/nopackcompatcheck

This 3d tools resource pack changes the 2d vanilla tools and weapons into a more 3d models tools and 3d weapons, and not just that, it also incorporates designs that is shaped based on the purpose, nativity, and level of tools, and also, it is good as a pvp pack and an item frame 1:1 decorative

Yes, this 3d tools pack will also expand 2 of my tool packs to modifying other items from other mods, so feel free to suggest some mods for the 3d weapons compatabilities since im too lazy to search

Also works on bedrock, so rename it from .zip to .mcpack (console users may have to find a different method)

**If You Want 3D Buckets, I Suggest Downloading This Pack Too:** https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/bucket-buddies/

**Other 3D Items packs that goes well with Tactical 3D Tools:**

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/carryon/

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-and-utils

MOD COMPATABILITIES:
- Blue Skies
- Cataclysm
- Farmers Delight
- Illager Invasion
- Immersive Engineering
- Mushroom Villager Trader
- Traders in Disguise
- Archers
- Death Knights
- Paladins
- Hunter's Return 
- Bagus Mobs 
- The Pillager Legion 
- Tax Ocean Villagers 
- Quark 
- RPG Series: Rogues


Why is it "Tactical"?

Simple, there are a sheer amount of 3d tools packs, so what i did is that instead of just copying the simple mmorpg or vanilla style, i based the style on various tactical weapons and real life modern tools, and also made sure that the design looks more slimmer and less exaggerated and less bulky. The pack still does its best to mix mmorpg styling and vanilla styling, but with my own kind of styling and rules.



Check out my Youtube channel, I make Youtube videos: [https://youtube.com/@siberianugget](https://youtube.com/@siberianugget)
